segments.text: First listen and then answer the question.

translations.zh-Hans: 先听录音，然后回答问题。

segments.text: Why do people think the writer is mad?

translations.zh-Hans: 为什么人们认为作者疯了？

segments.text: Airplanes are slowly driving me mad.

translations.zh-Hans: 飞机正在逐渐把我逼疯。

segments.text: I live near an airport and passing planes can be heard night and day.

translations.zh-Hans: 我住在机场附近，日夜都能听到飞机飞过的声音。

segments.text: The airport was built years ago but for some reason it could not be used then.

translations.zh-Hans: 机场是多年前建成的，但由于某种原因，当时未能启用。

segments.text: Last year, however, it came into use.

translations.zh-Hans: 然而，去年机场开始投入使用。

segments.text: Over a hundred people must have been driven away from their homes by the noise.

translations.zh-Hans: 肯定已有一百多人因为噪声被迫搬离家园。

segments.text: I am one of the few people left.

translations.zh-Hans: 我是少数留下来的人之一。

segments.text: Sometimes I think this house will be knocked down by a passing plane.

translations.zh-Hans: 有时我觉得这房子会被飞过的飞机撞倒。

segments.text: I have been offered a large sum of money to go away but I am determined to stay here.

translations.zh-Hans: 有人出一大笔钱让我搬走，但我决心留在这里。

segments.text: Everybody says I must be mad and they are probably right.

translations.zh-Hans: 人人都说我一定是疯了，他们也许说得对。
